_comment: Per-weapon transforms for parenting the GLB to the FPS hands' Hand.R bone. Slug → grip-relative offset + rotation (radians, XYZ Euler) + uniform scale. Tuned visually against the PSX hands rig in Blender; the runtime applies these when mounting the weapon as a child of the right-hand bone. All weapons were extracted with their local origin at the bottom-rear-center of the grip (see scripts/extract-weapons.py).
_units: meters; the runtime parents to a hand-bone whose transform is in centimeter-ish units, so a uniform scale of ~10 brings the weapon back to visual parity with the hand.
